final:
module top_module(
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] Pc,
    input ALUSrcA,
    output reg [31:0] muxout
);always @(A, Pc, ALUSrcA)begin
  if (ALUSrcA)begin
    muxout <= A;
  end
  else
    muxout <= Pc;
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      muxout <= ~A;
    end
  end

endmodule
